name: Delicate Homemade Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flours and salt on a clean, dry board.
2. Form them into a mound, then make a well in the center with even walls.
3. Crack the eggs into the well and add the olive oil.
4. Using a fork, gradually mix the flour into the egg mixture, keeping the well intact by cupping one hand around the wall of flour while brushing additional flour from above onto the well and incorporating it into the egg mixture. The mixture will become sticky; continue adding flour with the fork and using your other hand to keep the flour from scattering.
5. Sprinkle with water (the mixture may be sticky) and a little more flour for handling, mixing vigorously with hands until smooth and elastic.
6. Shape the dough into a ball, wrap in a damp towel, and let rest 30 minutes to an hour.
7. Divide the dough into eight pieces.
8. Roll out as thin as possible using pasta rollers or a rolling pin, starting thickest and working through thinner settings until desired thickness is reached (the dough will shrink slightly).
9. Cut with cutters or a knife into desired shapes and place on waxed paper until ready to cook. If storing, let dry and wrap in plastic; keep in a cool, dry place.
